progressionRule: Advanced equipment appears only after the founder proves earlier processes; buying a machine never skips its required training or facility gate.

walkthrough.title: 1 · FIND THE BOTTLENECK
walkthrough.text: Use the store when a real queue, cooldown, quality delay, or missing process prevents you from completing good customer work. Do not buy a machine only because it is unlocked.

walkthrough.title: 2 · CHECK THE WHOLE COST
walkthrough.text: Compare price, floor space, electrical service, ventilation or controlled-room needs, training, tooling, inspection, and staffing before you buy.

walkthrough.title: 3 · PROVE THE PROCESS
walkthrough.text: Playable capacity upgrades help immediately. Orientation equipment can be researched and planned, but its production workflow must be taught and qualified in the listed chapter.

walkthrough.title: 4 · MOVE AT THE RIGHT TIME
walkthrough.text: Upgrade the facility when quality and chapter work are proven and the current floor cannot safely hold the people, material, utilities, and equipment required for the next contracts.

items.name: SECOND BANDSAW
items.effect: Prepare stock while another job is machining.
items.spec: Manual horizontal saw · 40 sq ft · 240 V

items.name: ADDITIONAL 3-AXIS VMC
items.effect: Adds machining capacity and shortens queued cycle time.

items.name: INSPECTION BENCH
items.spec: Granite surface and calibrated hand tools · 80 sq ft

items.name: MANUAL TIG WELDING BENCH
items.effect: Unlocks aerospace sheet and tube welding contracts after qualification.
items.spec: AC/DC TIG · fume extraction · 100 sq ft

items.name: PRECISION SURFACE GRINDER
items.effect: Adds flatness and finish operations for close-tolerance work.

items.name: PRODUCTION CNC LATHE
items.effect: Unlocks turned aerospace parts and parallel mill/lathe routing.

items.name: POLYMER 3D PRINTER FARM
items.effect: Print fixtures, soft jaws, prototypes, and inspection aids.
items.spec: Six enclosed printers · 120 sq ft · filtered ventilation

items.name: 5-AXIS CNC MACHINING CENTER
items.effect: Combines complex aerospace faces in fewer setups after 5-axis certification.

items.name: ROBOTIC TIG WELDING CELL
items.effect: Repeats validated weld schedules with guarded robotic handling.

items.name: METAL ADDITIVE SYSTEM
items.effect: Builds complex metal geometry with powder controls and post-processing routes.
items.spec: Laser powder-bed fusion · inert gas · 500 sq ft controlled room

items.name: BRIDGE CMM CELL
items.effect: Automates dimensional inspection and traceable reports.

items.name: INDUSTRIAL X-RAY INSPECTION
items.effect: Finds internal defects in welds, castings, and additive parts without cutting them open.
items.spec: Shielded cabinet · licensed process · 650 sq ft controlled zone

items.name: COBOT TENDING PACKAGE
items.effect: Tends proven repeat work only after risk assessment and validation.
items.spec: Collaborative robot · guarding assessment · 220 sq ft

items.name: STARTER TUGGER AGV
items.effect: Carries one cart of labeled work between receiving, material prep, machining, and shipping on a fixed marked path.
items.kidSummary: It is a robot tug. People load and unload it; it follows one painted route.
items.spec: Low-speed fixed-route tugger; 1-unit cap; 140 sq ft for charging and cart parking; daily route check

items.name: AMR WIP FLEET
items.effect: Moves labeled work-in-process between seven departments while people keep control of priority, loading, and exceptions.
items.kidSummary: These robots choose safe aisles, but people still tell them what to move and fix blocked routes.
items.spec: Three autonomous mobile robots per fleet; 3-fleet cap; 420 sq ft charging and queue zone; mapped traffic controls

items.name: HEAVY MOBILE ROBOT PLATFORM
items.effect: Transfers fixtures and heavy WIP between machining, fabrication, inspection, and assembly after every handoff is validated.
items.kidSummary: This strong robot moves heavy carts. It stops unless the route and receiving station both say safe.
items.spec: High-payload mobile base; 4-unit cap; 650 sq ft staging and charging; guarded docking and interlocks

items.name: SUPERVISED HUMANOID ASSISTANT
items.effect: Assists with supervised kitting, inspection paperwork, and maintenance-parts delivery; it never replaces a qualified operator or enters hazardous work alone.
items.kidSummary: This helper works beside trained people on approved chores. A person always stays responsible.
items.spec: Very-late pilot; 2-unit cap; 240 sq ft dock and test zone; supervised non-hazardous tasks only
